title: Village Farms International (VFF) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Village Farms consolidated total sales growth of 20% year-over-year reaching $83.4 million. Positive consolidated adjusted EBITDA of $5.3 million, a 65% increase from prior year. Net losses narrowed to $800,000 or $0.01 per share. Fresh produce division sales climbed 20% to approximately $43 million. Gross margins improved 400 basis points to 8% with segment generating positive adjusted EBITDA of $2.3 million and net income of $400,000. Canadian cannabis net sales grew 29% year-over-year to roughly $50 million CAD though gross margins contracted to 26% from 35% due to increased non-branded wholesale activity. Segment produced adjusted EBITDA of $6.5 million CAD and operating cash flow of $6.1 million CAD. International medical cannabis sales doubled year-over-year with expansion in Germany, Australia and UK. US cannabis operations generated $3.9 million in sales with 63% gross margin. Company began cultivation at Netherlands facility with initial sales anticipated in Q1 2025. Ended Q3 with $28.7 million in cash and $65.4 million in working capital against total term debt of $43 million.
